methods.void setTextSelectHandleLeft(int textSel: Sets the Drawable corresponding to the left handle used for selecting text.
methods.void setTextSelectHandleLeft(Drawable te: Sets the Drawable corresponding to the left handle used for selecting text.
methods.void setTextSelectHandleRight(Drawable t: Sets the Drawable corresponding to the right handle used for selecting text.
methods.void setTextSelectHandleRight(int textSe: Sets the Drawable corresponding to the right handle used for selecting text.
methods.void setTextSize(int unit, float size): Set the default text size to a given unit and value.
methods.void setTextSize(float size): Set the default text size to the given value, interpreted as "scaled pixel" units.
methods.void setTransformationMethod(Transformat: Sets the transformation that is applied to the text that this TextView is displaying.
methods.void setTypeface(Typeface tf): Sets the typeface and style in which the text should be displayed.
methods.void setTypeface(Typeface tf, int style): Sets the typeface and style in which the text should be displayed, and turns on the fake bold and italic bits in the Paint if the Typeface that you provided does not have all the bits in the style that you specified.
methods.void setUseBoundsForWidth(boolean useBou: Set true for using width of bounding box as a source of automatic line breaking and drawing.
methods.void setWidth(int pixels): Sets the width of the TextView to be exactly pixels wide.
methods.boolean showContextMenu(): Shows the context menu for this view.
methods.boolean showContextMenu(float x, float y: Shows the context menu for this view anchored to the specified view-relative coordinate.
